title: Error with window.crypto.randomUUID in n8n 1.120.x
symptom: After updating to n8n version 1.120.x, users encounter the error 'window.crypto.randomUUID is not a function' when adding nodes.
not_this_if: The instance is running with HTTPS
root_cause: The error occurs due to a change in the implementation of the crypto API in n8n version 1.120.x, which affects how random UUIDs are generated. This issue is particularly prevalent in instances running over HTTP rather than HTTPS.
fix_steps: Downgrade n8n to a version prior to 1.120.x
Ensure the instance is running over HTTPS if possible
agent_instruction: Downgrade n8n to a version before 1.120.x or switch to HTTPS.
